| womenhlth_uincont | Specialist questionnaire data | Womens health questionnaire | Incontinence |  |  | stress94 | 22029 |  | Stress incontinence (derived) 1994 - at age 48 years | {-9.0} Unknown   {0.0} No   {1.0} Yes   {9.0} Missing   {99.0} Non-respondent/ Not appropriate(including men) | Not applicable | Woman's Health Questionnaire | 18, 20(a) | 1994 | Yes | No |  | This variable is derived from 2 items: Women who replied positively to the question “Do you ever lose any urine when you cough, sneeze, laugh, run or exercise” and those who provided response of “less than once a month” to “daily”  to the question “..during the last 12 months how often have you lost any urine when you did not mean to ..’’ were considered as showing symptoms of stress incontinence |
